questions.question: Design a simple SMS telephony system using SQLite database in Android. What features should be included in the system?
questions.hint: Consider the user's needs, security, and scalability

questions.question: An SMS telephony system is integrated with a Location Based Service (LBS) to provide location-based SMS alerts. How would you implement the LBS integration and what considerations should be taken into account?
questions.hint: Consider the location data sources, privacy concerns, and system performance

questions.question: A mobile application uses an SMS telephony system and LBS to provide real-time location-based alerts to emergency services. How would you optimize the database storage and queries to ensure efficient data retrieval and minimize battery consumption?
questions.hint: Consider the database schema, indexing, and query optimization techniques
